extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each entity: I excluded the Company’s 208 criminal and 32 tax proceedings filed by the Company, including the 205 Section 138 matters, and counted only the Company’s Against row—criminal 0, tax 7 and statutory/regulatory 1; Directors, Promoters and Group Companies have nil against proceedings. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is ₹68.31 million, from the stated Against the Company row; converted at ₹10 million per crore, this is ₹6.831 crore, while the By the Company amount of ₹461.93 million is excluded. The contingent-liabilities table states a Total of ₹394.55 million as of June 30, 2023, which is used without re-summing and converts to ₹39.455 crore; commitments are excluded from the contingent-liabilities total. The only customer concentration percentage is segment-specific—top ten overseas distributors accounted for 89.81% of revenue from operations outside India in Fiscal 2023—so no company-wide top-five or top-ten percentage is extracted. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
